Container.Name: Whackamole
Container.Overview: Whackamole watches completed torrents from QUI, asks Upload Assistant whether tracker uploads pass checks, then uses read-only Sonarr/Radarr searches to flag unique or upgrade-worthy upload candidates. API keys are stored encrypted in /config.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Whackamole configuration, encrypted secrets, and local queue database.

Config.Name: Media Root
Config.Description: Read-only media path that matches the Upload Assistant container view.

Config.Name: UA Temp
Config.Description: Read-only Upload Assistant temp path, used only when your UA workflow needs that mounted view.

Config.Name: Config Directory
Config.Description: Internal config directory. Leave as /config unless you change the container path.

Config.Name: Initial API Token
Config.Description: Required only when no API token is already stored. Use at least 32 random characters.

Config.Name: UI Bypass Networks
Config.Description: Explicit non-global CIDRs that may use the browser UI without password login. Bearer APIs remain protected.

Config.Name: Allowed UI Origins
Config.Description: Comma-separated exact browser origins permitted for Host and CSRF validation. Update the port if the host mapping differs.

Config.Name: Secure Session Cookie
Config.Description: Set true only when the UI is served through HTTPS.

Config.Name: Allowed Media Roots
Config.Description: Container paths within which local inspection and rename operations are permitted.
